summary: ICE Director Todd Lyons gives a vertical, caption-subtitled weekly operations recap (Boston operation, 370 arrests, meth/fentanyl seizures) with a brief inserted detainee photo and follow-button overlays. It is a talking-head speech driven by his own words, not a music track, so it is not a music-driven genre/youth-appeal piece despite social-media styling.
notable_text: to a very successful operation; we seized 44 kilograms of meth; SEE THE FULL VIDEO ON FACEBOOK & YOUTUBE; Please don't listen; the public safety threats; follow @ICEgov
